message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User
entity server
database user

User -> server : **1** POST /sign-up with body: email and password
server -> user : **2** Check email existence

alt [Email existed]
    server <-- user : **3** Error code
    User <-- server : **4** Error message
else [Email is new]
    server <-- user : **5** Email is available
    server -> server : **6** Hash password
    server -> user : **7** Store email and hashed password
    server <-- user : **8** Store complete
    User <-- server : **9** Success message
end

@enduml
```
